ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: 1. ADDITION OF CSDES CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU3226.01E. 2. ADDITION OF IPS CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN SUBMITTAL AU3253 .01E. 3. ADDITION OF ICB IW CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN AU3301.01E. 4. ADDITION OF ICB IW CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN AU3295.01E. 5. ADDITION OF ICB IW CLIN PRICING AS DETAILED IN AU3280.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION ICB CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER SERVICES PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3257.01E. 2. ADDITION OF INDIVIDUAL CASE BASE CASE NUMBER(S) FOR MANAGED NETWORK SERVICE DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3262.01E. 3. ADDITION ICB CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3318.01E. 4. ADDITION ICB CUSTOMER CONTACT CENTER PRICING, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3320.01E. 5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION OF ICB CAA PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3267.01E. 2. ADDITION OF SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3313.02E. 3. ADDITION OF SEVEN (7) WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3315.01E. 4. CORRECTION OF A PREVIOUSLY AWARDED MOD (PS568), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3326.01S. 5. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 6. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADD DOMESTIC WIRELINE ICB OC-3 ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3307.01E. 2. CORRECT THE FREQUENCY FROM USAGE TO NRC ON PREVIOUSLY AWARDED PS625, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3335.01S. 3. ADD PRICES FOR A NBIP-VPNS CRITICAL ETHERNET 2 GBPS PORT SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3324.01E. 4. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 5. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS646) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADDITION ACCESS DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET NSC PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3306.01E. 2. ADDITION TWO (2) AUDIO AUTHORITY SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3319.01E. 3. ADDITION PREMISES WIRING INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS PRICING AND CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3340.01E. 4. PRICE REDUCTION FOR ONE (1) EMC SERVICE ENABLING DEVICE (SED), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3342.01P. 5. REMOVES TWO (2) EMC SERVICE ENABLING DEVICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3345.01S. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS647) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADD 4 INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CASES FOR PREMISE WIRE AND CABLING UNDER CLIN 890955, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3317.01E. 2. ADD TWENTY THREE (23) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3338.01E. 3. ADD SIX (6) SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3346.01E. 4. ADD DOMESTIC BROADBAND ETHERNET ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3305.01E. 5. ADD ONE SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS NSC PRICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3344.01E. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS648) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement:
THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES:
1. ADD FOUR (4) CLINS AND PRICES FOR DOMESTIC METRO ETHERNET, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3259.01E.
2. ADD NRC CASE NUMBER, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3347.01E.
3. ADD CLIN (760644) AND SHARED ETHERNET ACCESS (4MBPS) WITH ELECTRICAL INTERFACE BY SERVING WIRE CENTER (SWC) AND CLINS (760634, 760638, AND 760635) BY NETWORK SITE CODE (NSC), AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3271.01E.
4. ADD MNS FEATURE PRICES, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3311.01E.
5. ADD PRICES FOR OC-3C SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3325.01E.
6. REDUCE PRICE OF WIRELINE ACCESS, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3367.01P.
7. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION.
8. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

entry.title: IDC GS00T07NSD0007 (PS649) awarded to A T AND T CORPORATION (4710), was modified for the amount of $0

ns1:contractingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:fundingRequestingOfficeID.name: GSA/FAS ITS NETWORK SERVICES CONTRACT OPERATIONS DIVISION 2

ns1:reasonForModification.description: SUPPLEMENTAL AGREEMENT FOR WORK WITHIN SCOPE

ns1:contractData.ns1:descriptionOfContractRequirement: THE PURPOSE OF THIS MODIFICATION IS TO REFLECT THE FOLLOWING CHANGES: 1. ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT UNDER CLIN 769013, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3331.01E. 2. ADD EIGHT (8) (7-CISCO AND 1-APCC) WIRELINE SEDS TO SUPPORT NETWORK BASED INTERNET PROTOCOL VIRTUAL PRIVATE NETWORK SERVICE, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3328.01E. 3. ADD INDIVIDUAL CASE BASIS (ICB) CUSTOM ACCESS ARRANGEMENT UNDER CLIN 769013, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3330.01E. 4. ADD ONE NETWORK SITE CODE-BASED OC3 PLANTINUM SECONDARY CIRCUIT AND ONE ETHERNET 100MBPS ACCESS CIRCUIT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3314.01E. 5. REDUCE PRICE OF MTIPS CRITICAL PORT, AS DESCRIBED IN SUBMITTAL AU3360.01P. 6. THE TOTAL ESTIMATED DOLLAR VALUE OF THE CONTRACT IS UNCHANGED BY THIS MODIFICATION. 7. ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.

ns1:performanceBasedServiceContract.description: NO - SERVICE WHERE PBA IS NOT USED.

ns1:productOrServiceCode.description: IT AND TELECOM- TELECOMMUNICATIONS AND TRANSMISSION

ns1:recoveredMaterialClauses.description: NO CLAUSES INCLUDED AND NO SUSTAINABILITY INCLUDED

ns1:vendorHeader.ns1:vendorDoingAsBusinessName: A T AND T COMM SVCS INTL

ALL SUBMITTALS BEING ADDED TO THE CONTRACT ARE EXCLUSIVE OF COVER LETTERS AND ANY SUPPORTING DOCUMENTATION SUBMITTED TO THE NHC.
